task_name: Production reconciliation and raw material clearance
dependencies: Must be completed before shutdown commences on 14th March

task_name: Safety team inspection and permit preparation
dependencies: Can run parallel to civil pre-shutdown activities
Minimum 48 hours cooling time must be complete before demolition starts

task_name: Electrical disconnect, switchgear and motor inspection
dependencies: Can run concurrent with refractory demolition

task_name: Tuyere and blow pipe assembly removal and inspection
dependencies: Can start Day 2 after initial cooling

responsible_party: M/s Vesuvius India Limited (25–30 contract workers)

task_name: Tuyere replacement and blow pipe refurbishment
dependencies: Can proceed during refractory curing phase (Days 14–17)

task_name: Final walkdown inspection by all department heads
dependencies: Electrical reconnection and safety verification complete

task_name: Hot commissioning – gradual heat-up and initial hot blast trial
responsible_party: Chief Operations Officer – Mr. Venkatesh + Production Team
